values.value: [ { "q": "Which DeliveryHubSettings field acts as the org-wide opt-in for automatic invoice generation?", "options": [ "EnableInvoiceGenerationDateTime__c", "InvoiceEnabledCheckbox__c", "BillingFrequencyPk__c", "LastInvoiceGenerationDate__c" ], "correct": 0, "explanation": "DeliveryInvoiceGenerationService.shouldRunToday checks EnableInvoiceGenerationDateTime__c != null. Per DH rules there are no Boolean fields — the DateTime stamp doubles as the opt-in flag and the activation timestamp." }, { "q": "A vendor has BillingFrequencyPk__c=Monthly. On what day of the month will DH's scheduled job generate their invoice?", "options": [ "The day they were onboarded", "The 1st of the month", "The 15th of the month", "Every day of the month" ], "correct": 1, "explanation": "shouldGenerateForEntity returns true for Monthly only when Date.today().day() == 1. Quarterly additionally requires the month to be Jan/Apr/Jul/Oct." }, { "q": "Which WorkLog status counts as 'invoiceable hours' for the period check in hasApprovedHoursInPeriod?", "options": [ "Only Approved", "Approved or null", "Any status except Rejected", "Approved or Pending" ], "correct": 1, "explanation": "hasApprovedHoursInPeriod queries StatusPk__c = 'Approved' OR StatusPk__c = null. Logs that have never been touched (null status) count alongside explicitly Approved ones. Rejected and Draft do not." }, { "q": "After a successful sweep, which field on DeliveryHubSettings prevents the job from running again on the same day?", "options": [ "EnableInvoiceGenerationDateTime__c", "InvoiceDueDateOffsetDays__c", "LastInvoiceGenerationDate__c", "BillingFrequencyPk__c" ], "correct": 2, "explanation": "The service stamps settings.LastInvoiceGenerationDate__c = Date.today() at the end of generateScheduledDocuments, and shouldRunToday returns false when that field already equals today." }, { "q": "An On_Demand frequency vendor needs an invoice now. What is the right way to ship it?", "options": [ "Wait for the next scheduled sweep", "Set BillingFrequencyPk__c to Monthly temporarily", "Use the manual invoice quick action on the vendor's record page", "Clear LastInvoiceGenerationDate__c to force a re-run" ], "correct": 2, "explanation": "The scheduled job explicitly skips On_Demand entities (continue on the frequency check). On_Demand exists precisely so you control timing through the manual quick action, not the sweep." } ]
